justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted all temporal expressions provided by the user.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent only reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly asked the same question, 'Would you like me to check for other times or days?', which felt redundant.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and identical phrasing for unavailability made the conversation feel somewhat robotic and less helpful.
